meeting, we ought to file the next day.  Thoughts?

Subject: Request
Date: Thu, 10 Apr 2008 20:24:10 GMT

JEE had requested that the permitting application be applied for in regard  
to placing rocks on the reef extending out from the new office on LSJ
Is this your responsibility or John's?
We need to move on this
Thanks Karen
